feedback.summary: MOD-GRID-10/G-005 VERIFY — 100/95 PASS. All 5 G-005 deliverables verified across 11 implementFiles + 2 cascade configs: (1) commitChanges 4-step 3-branch flow (useChangeTracking.ts L206-244), (2) editedCellsMap reducer-driven wiring (changeMap.ts L48 field + L161-219 applyUpdate gate + L280-297 purgeEditedCellsForKey + L399-469 applyUndo branches), (3) ChangeTrackingGrid alias NEW (legacy/ChangeTrackingGrid.tsx L1-160 composition pattern), (4) EditableGrid additive enableChangeTracking + rowKey props (EditableGrid.tsx L25-110 backward-compat preserved), (5) PayrollEditablePage commitChanges additive path with typeof-check graceful degradation (PayrollEditablePage.tsx L99-115). Independent tsc x2 exit 0, size-limit 2.71 KB / 20 KB (13.5%), Wijmo 0 hits, any 0 hits. ADR-008 4 sub-sections + 6 alternatives + 3 trade-offs authored at decisions.md L284-350. MOD-GRID-10 module CLOSED — all 5 Goals 100/95 PASS.
feedback.implementScoreCorrection: implement-score.json documentedDeviations[3] claimed 'ADR-008 not authored in decisions.md, decisions.md ends at ADR-007 (L280)'. VERIFY found ADR-008 EXISTS at L284-350 with all 4 sub-sections (ADR-008-01 commitChanges, ADR-008-02 peerDeps, ADR-008-03 legacy alias migration order, ADR-008-04 editedCells wiring) + alternatives + trade-offs + consequences. The deviation entry was stale — likely from haiku Coverage Verifier's read offset cutoff before ADR-008 was committed, or noted before final commit. No action needed — ADR-008 satisfies C-14.
feedback.implementQualityNote: Implementer correctly identified structural cascades (tsup.config.ts external[] + monorepo .size-limit.json ignore[]) that spec Section 7 did not explicitly enumerate — properly documented in implement-score specCodeDefects[]/documentedDeviations[]. C-29 conditional spread applied at 2 sites (legacy/ChangeTrackingGrid.tsx L82-91 for 4 optional ChangeTrackingConfig fields; EditableGrid.tsx L129-132 for EditableCell.selectOptions). Synthetic rowKey WeakMap strategy in tw-framework-front compat shim (L86-94) is robust for object rows + documented limitation in ADR-008-03 trade-off section.
feedback.visualRegressionNote: C-02 evidence chain solid: (a) spec Section 3 row 1 + ADR-008-03 + impl L37-42 inline comment all converge on 'OLD class strings retained byte-for-byte for visual preservation'. (b) The intentional divergence from G-004 monorepo defaultRowStatusClassNames (border-l-* vs border-*) is the right call for compat shim — fresh-style defaults are only for new consumers via the monorepo alias path. Future Goal can unify via tw-framework-front consumer opt-in if needed.
feedback.horizonRisks: None blocking. Future-loop notes: (i) verifyOrWarn real wiring lands when MOD-GRID-99-A/G-002 ships — grid-pro-tracking peerDeps will need @tomis/grid-license added at that time. (ii) Per-column-id editedCells tracking (vs current accessorKey-based) is documented limitation (ADR-008-04 alternative 6 deferred) — acceptable for tw-framework-front conventions where accessorKey === colId. (iii) PayrollEditablePage fetcher iterates per-row internally because payroll BE has no batch endpoint — when batch lands, fetcher body trivially swaps to single network call.
